name: No-Bake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Heat until boiling, stirring well.
3. Remove from heat and add peanut butter, stirring until it melts completely.
4. Add oatmeal, cocoa, and vanilla; mix thoroughly.
5. Drop by tablespoon onto wax paper or a clean smooth tabletop.
6. Allow to cool.
